nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Bradypterus
nodes.summary: Bradypterus（Bradypterus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联12种鸟类，如Knysna warbler、Bangwa forest warbler、Barratt's warbler等12种鸟类。

nodes.name: Dja River scrub warbler
nodes.summary: The Dja River scrub warbler (Bradypterus grandis) is a species of Old World warbler in the family Locustellidae. It is found in Cameroon, Central African Republic, and Gabon. Its natural habitat is swamps. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
